title: Vaa Deal Lyrics Vaa Deal Song Lyrics
singerName: Megha, Senthil Dass, Sooraj Santhosh, Suchith Suresan
stanzas:
Vaa Deal Song Lyrics 
Singer(s): Suchith Suresan, Sooraj Santhosh, Senthildass, Sam. P, Keerthan
& Megha

vedi vedi
idhu saravedi saravedi
kodi kodi
ini parakkattum jayakkodi
podi podi
ada edhirigal podi podi
erimalai kumuralai
panithuli adakkumaa.

Adi adi
ivan adigalum idi idi
pidi pidi
ada udumbena ivan pidi
mudi mudi
ivan sirasinil madhimudi
narigalin thandhiram
ivanidam palikkumaa.

modhi paarudaa modhi paaru
vettri veludaa vettri veludaa
modhi paaruda moonji udayum
dhillirundhaa deal-e thaan
power aana aaludaa
evan vandhu ivan munna
ninnu paarthaa deal-u da

vedi vedi
idhu saravedi saravedi
kodi kodi
ini parakkattum jayakkodi
podi podi
ada edhirigal podi podi
erimalai kumuralai
panithuli adakkumaa.

Thanni vaththi pona kadal
boomiyila illada
thati kaetta vetkapatta
aamvalaye illada

Neram kaalam ellaam
paarthu thittamitta
podhumey.
Neththiliyidam maattikkitta
thimingalam thorkkumey.

Kolai vazhkaye palakkamilla
kooru podura veera pulla

Suththi vitta pambaram
pola kaalu suththidum.
kaththi kambu aruvaalum
kalangidum deal-u da.

Arjunaru amba pola
thavaraama thaakkuven.
ettu dhisai thirumbida
yaedhedho pannuven.

Kaththi sanda puththi sanda
rendulayum ...
kombanukku komban kooda
vambiluthaa gaalida..

konjam kooda illa bayamthaam
yedhayum saachidum
yaana balamthaan.

Kaiyya kaala kattavum
vaazha otta vettavum.
vittha ellaam kattravan.
eppayumey jeyuppendaa.

vedi vedi
idhu saravedi saravedi
kodi kodi
ini parakkattum jayakkodi
podi podi
ada edhirigal podi podi
erimalai kumuralai
panithuli adakkumaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vaa Deal'?

The song 'Vaa Deal' conveys a sense of excitement and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life and enjoy the moment.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Vaa Deal'?

The movie Vaa Deal revolves around themes of friendship and adventure, with the song capturing the spirit of fun and camaraderie among the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Vaa Deal'?

The song features the talented voices of Megha, Senthil Dass, Sooraj Santhosh, and Suchith Suresan.

When was 'Vaa Deal' released?

'Vaa Deal' was released on April 26, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Vaa Deal' is a lively dance number that encapsulates the essence of celebration and joy in the movie Vaa Deal. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it invites listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The collaboration of multiple talented singers adds a unique flavor, making it a perfect fit for parties and festive occasions. Overall, the song evokes a sense of energy and excitement, resonating with the youthful spirit of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaa Deal is an electrifying anthem that brings together the dynamic voices of Megha, Senthil Dass, Sooraj Santhosh, and Suchith Suresan. This vibrant track from the movie Vaa Deal is sure to get you on your feet with its infectious beats and lively lyrics. Experience the perfect blend of energy and fun that makes this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Come, deal, come, deal, the deal is ready.
This is a fiery situation, let it soar high. Let the victory flag fly. Let the obstacles be removed, let the challenges be faced, will the cool breeze hold back?
Hey, hey, this person is strong. Hold tight, hold tight. Is this body strong? Will he be able to handle the burdens of the world?
Look at the strategy, look at the plan. Victory is here. Look at the face, the deal is the power. If someone sees him, it's a deal.
The deal is here, the strength is here. The deal is here, the strength is here.
This is a fiery situation, let it soar high. Let the victory flag fly. Let the obstacles be removed, let the challenges be faced, will the cool breeze hold back?
If the water flows away, there’s no land left. If the tree falls, there’s no one left.
Time and season will change, it’s enough to plan. The timing will change everything.
In a life of struggle, there’s no escape. The brave ones will rise.
Like a snake that has shed its skin, the feet will move. The sword and the spear will also tremble, it’s a deal.
Like Arjuna, I will not back down. I will turn in all directions and do whatever it takes.
The sword and the spear are both sharp... even the strong will face challenges.
There’s no fear at all, whatever happens will be handled with strength.
With hands and feet tied, life will be a struggle. The one who has sown will reap. Always victorious.
The deal is here, the strength is here. The deal is here, the strength is here.
This is a fiery situation, let it soar high. Let the victory flag fly. Let the obstacles be removed, let the challenges be faced, will the cool breeze hold back?
The deal is here, the strength is here.
